selections.name: Vantorix
selections.reason: Dominant 2.5L debut winner at Taree. Retains the inside barrier and looks a class above this field. Unexposed elite potential.

selections.name: Naystar
selections.reason: First starter by Star Turn. Showed good early speed in a recent Beaudesert trial finishing second. Drawn well to feature.

selections.name: Brief Authority
selections.reason: Anders gelding making his debut. Has put together two solid trials and the Matthew Dunn stable must be respected.

selections.name: To'o
selections.reason: Encryption gelding who was runner-up in a recent trial. Keep safe on debut.

danger_horse.name: Naystar
danger_horse.reason: Trial form suggests he has the tactical speed to challenge the favorite early.

selections.name: Poetic Angel
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Ran a solid 3rd on debut at Ballina. Matthew Dunn stable strikes well fresh and she looks ready to go close.

selections.name: Mccosker
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed ability in his first campaign including a placing at Murwillumbah. Drops back to a suitable trip.

selections.name: Steffiewah
selections.reason: First starter for Paul Snowden. Won a recent trial at Taree and profiles well for a bold debut.

selections.name: On My Command
selections.reason: First starter who scored in a recent Ballina trial. Awkward barrier but has the raw ability to figure.

danger_horse.name: Mccosker
danger_horse.reason: Has race experience over the debutants and maps to get a perfect run just off the speed.

selections.name: Foxy Artist
selections.reason: Made good ground from midfield to finish 3rd here last start. Fitter now and the extra distance looks ideal.

selections.name: Lofty Macsporran
selections.reason: Blinkers go on after a fair 4th at Doomben. Has plenty of upside and is ready to break through.

selections.name: Sasqua
selections.reason: Faded last start but his debut 3rd at Port Macquarie was solid. Can bounce back if he handles the wide draw.

selections.name: Virginia Breezes
selections.reason: Eased back early last start but has placed previously. Drawn well to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Lofty Macsporran
danger_horse.reason: The gear change (blinkers on) from a top stable often signals intent to win.

selections.name: Fiction Society
selections.reason: Won by a nose at this track and distance last start. In career-best form and maps to get a perfect run.

selections.name: Jukebox In Siberia
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten by Fiction Society last start. Meets him better at the weights and is the obvious threat.

selections.name: Lady Alabama
selections.reason: Won nicely at this track over a mile last start. Drops back in trip but has excellent credentials.

selections.name: Spills
selections.reason: Solid 3rd in a BM70 at Eagle Farm last start. Drops in grade and gets the inside barrier.

danger_horse.name: Jukebox In Siberia
danger_horse.reason: Only missed by a nose last start and gets a weight swing in her favor.

selections.name: Rich Star
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick after a narrow win here last start. Drawn perfectly to dictate terms again.

selections.name: Gaylord
selections.reason: Strong 2nd here last start. Has the class to overcome the wide barrier if he gets luck early.

selections.name: Storm Merchant
selections.reason: Resuming. Won his debut impressively and has trialed well leading into this.

selections.name: Enhance
selections.reason: Runner-up on a wet track last start. Drawn well and gets a jockey upgrade.

danger_horse.name: Gaylord
danger_horse.reason: Highest rated horse in the field, only the barrier is a concern.

selections.name: Show 'Em Howl
selections.reason: Classy gelding dropping significantly in grade from the Country Championships. Drawn well and should prove too strong.

selections.name: She's Exotic
selections.reason: Resuming. Has an excellent fresh record and maps to get a soft run behind the speed.

selections.name: House Of Cards
selections.reason: Resuming after a break. Won a recent trial and has form in stronger Sydney races.

selections.name: The Wolf
selections.reason: Fitter for his first-up run. Generally improves second-up and is a definite threat at his best.

danger_horse.name: She's Exotic
danger_horse.reason: Lethal fresh record and gets a perfect map from barrier 2.

selections.name: Sonder
selections.reason: Won well at this track and distance last start. Drawn perfectly to get a similar run and can repeat.

selections.name: Amahni's Girl
selections.reason: Drops in class after a solid 4th in a BM70 at Eagle Farm. The extra trip should suit her perfectly.

selections.name: Champagne Rouge
selections.reason: Ran on strongly for 3rd here last start. Racing consistently and will be hitting the line hard.

selections.name: Yukanuma
selections.reason: On the quick back-up after a fair 4th at Gold Coast. Capable of improving over this distance.

danger_horse.name: Amahni's Girl
danger_horse.reason: Class drop from Metro grade makes her a massive threat despite the weight.
